reviews.negatives: I got Ecoli and needed medical assistance to help me. I was a bit surprised as this is a resort where you have to pay a premium, so getting sick is not ok! I paid $600 to get medical help.

reviews.title: No good

reviews.title: I don not recommed this place.  Stay at A+Tanoe hotel which is were stayed for couple of nights
reviews.positives: Beautiful location and view of the ocean. I had the best massage at this place.
reviews.negatives:
I reserved a room with an ocean view.  Sol or maybe Solo was the employee who checked us in. I verified with him that we have booked a room with an ocean view, and he confirmed that we will indeed receive the room with an ocean view.  
When he said our room is on the first floor, I was a little puzzled.  So I inquired once more if this is an Ocean View room, to which he responded affirmatively.  When I entered the room, there was a large ugly green tarp in front with no view and a garden in the rear with no view of the ocean.  I immediately contacted Sol back, at which point he denied and stated that the property has only a HANDFUL OF PARTICALLY OCEAN VIEW and that he had told me that the property is at an OCEAN VIEW SITE and not ocean view. 
My next objective was to return home and contact Booking.com to determine why the property was mistakenly advertised
 The day of my return I was on  the third floor, I discovered that every room has an ocean view.  Thus, Sol blatantly lied to me.  I requested to speak to the manager.  As they were aware of the situation with Sol and knew  I was checking out that day, they completely avoided me while I waited for nearly two hours.
My vegan daughter was served non-vegan food in her room by the staff.  She became very ill and couldn't get out of bed for four days.  Anna especially and few other staff members accused us of lying.  They informed us that more than 100 persons ate the dish and no one became ill. I then inquired how many vegans there were out of 100 and how many people you served the incorrect dish? Our vacation was ruined because of the hotel error and our stay at this place was a nightmare. This establishment is cookie-cutter, and it's employees' lack knowledge outside the norm.  It is not worth staying here.
I also stayed at the  Tanoe hotel for a few nights as well, and If I can give them more than 5 stars, I would

reviews.title: Staff at the reception counter is not capable to handle the customers.
reviews.text:
The staff on the reception counter donot bother about the complaints made by customers. Specially the booking duty manager was very rude to us. She does not want to listen to us. We booked 3 rooms and Check in time was 2 pm but till 2.45 pm we were not alloted the 3rd room and when we complained this to the duty manager she did not want to listen to us. 
Secondly we booked rooms through Agoda but the rates given by Agoda were different and the hotel charged more than that when we met duty manager she did not want to listen to us. Even 2 star hotel gives better services than this digital resort in denarau. 
Never recommend anyone to stay there

reviews.title: Not suitable for a relaxing adult break
reviews.text:
I have stayed at this hotel previously and specifically chose to return because of the quality of the facilities and the overall experience. Unfortunately, this stay has been a significant disappointment.

Despite having access to all facilities on my previous visit, this time I do not have access to the adults-only pool. As a result, the only pool available is the main family pool, which is very loud and dominated by children. There is effectively nowhere to relax, unwind, or enjoy a quiet environment. This makes the hotel poorly suited for an adults-only break or anyone seeking rest and tranquillity.

In addition, the food quality has declined considerably since my last stay. Meals that were previously a highlight now feel average at best, with less variety and noticeably lower quality overall.

While the hotel may still work well for families with young children, it no longer offers the experience it once did for adult travellers. Based on this visit, I would not recommend it as a destination for an adult-focused or relaxing break.

reviews.title: Bad customer service
reviews.text: Despite their website saying that all renovation works had been completed, the main building was surrounded by scaffolding and nets, and we were woken up at 6am with extremely loud banging noises outside our room resulting from scaffolding being unloaded from a truck. We immediately went to the lobby to complain about the noise, and complained again at check-out when asked whether we had enjoyed our stay. Neither complaint yielded any result. When we followed up our complaint through Agoda we were told that they would not be providing any discount to our room price as there was no record of us having made a complaint during our stay!!! Terrible customer service. We will never come back here.
reviews.room_type: Superior Queen Room with Two Queen Beds

reviews.negatives: Room was in area of resort trash collection. Room flooring was filthy and there was a strong odor in the bath room.

reviews.text: this hotel is great if you have small children for those, like me without children it is hell, screaming children running riot, there is no area to get away from them.  the hotel is pretty basic by 4 star standards with no hopsitality showers for late checkout, considering this is a beach resort l would think this is a basic service that should be offered, also having to pay extra for wifi is a bit rich considering their room rates.

reviews.title: Good for a short time
reviews.text: I stayed 2 nights, must say, I enjoyed it, I think a week would have become a little boring, but, must also need to say, drinks were extremely expensive. My bed had a mattress cover, but I felt it was still too firm, also the feather pillows were too soft. I thought I had a good room, with great views, but, from my view point, from the 2nd floor, unfortunately, I couldn't see the view for the palm trees Lol.

reviews.title: Nice enough, but better luxury hotels on Denarau
reviews.text:
The Sofitel fell well short of my expectation of a European five-star brand. 
The rooms are well sized (albeit strangely laid out, with the TV perpendicular to the bed and not in line with the couch) with comfortable beds; however the small, claustrophobic bathrooms are not in any way luxurious and were showing signs of mould. To make matters worse the bathroom door did not properly open, with the barrel not properly retracting with turning the door handle. 
Housekeeping, while done daily, was done poorly – with toiletries not being re-stocked across a three day stay. Oddly it’s as the hotel caters to the single business traveller, with only one wine glass, one glass tumble, one bath-robe and one set of slippers provided. 
Staff performance was mixed: while the door-man was incredibly friendly and some F&B attendants were very professional, check-in staff were cold and clinical and activities staff were disinterested and unhelpful.
On the plus side, V Restaurant (the Sofitel’s fine dining establishment) was incredibly good and represented fantastic value for money. 
Overall the Sofitel was nice enough for what I paid (I was able to obtain quite a good deal), however if you’re looking for European standard five-star luxury, I suggest looking elsewhere.
reviews.positives: V restaurant; large pool

reviews.title: It was enjoyable but just OK
reviews.text: It was just OK for the money spent. I also stayed at other Denarau Hotels and would not stay here again. It is a bit tired and rooms are badly designed. I would head back to the Radisson Blu every time and it was actually less expensive. It might be a little thing, but I despise Five Star Hotels charging extra for internet access which is  now  pretty much a basic requirement
reviews.positives: Staff, Restaurants - proximity to nicer resorts

reviews.title: Average
reviews.positives: The breakfast was nice and the staff was friendly.
reviews.negatives: I arrived late at night (after midnight) and the floors were soaking wet.  I turned up the AC hoping that that would dry them but it didn’t. I told the front desk in the morning that I had slipped on the wet floors at night and they smiled and offered their apologies. That was inadequate for such a high end hotel.

reviews.title: Friendly and clean resort but feels like cruise ship.
reviews.text:
We stayed 1 night at the sofitel from being on the islands. The Rooms were clean and the porters, cleaning staff, and check-in team were all genuinely friendly and welcoming — can’t fault the service there.

The resort itself felt a bit like a cruise ship on land — if you’re into that scene, you’ll probably love it. For us, it lacked a bit of atmosphere and felt more busy than relaxing. Buffet breakfast was chaotic, with long lines and lots of noise. Also worth noting: only one barista coffee per person is included at the buffet, which felt a bit stingy for a 5-star resort.
reviews.room_type: Family Room with One Queen and Two Tier Bunk Bed

reviews.title: Not 5 Star or Sofitel Standard
reviews.text: Sofitel should do better. Extremely overpriced and not even average food in Solis restaurant. No communication with customer before arrival. Booked 3 adults but nothing set up for 3, no bed, no towels etc. Staff is nice but management must be below standard.

reviews.title: LOUD MUSIC IN RESORT MAKES IT IMPOSSIBLE TO RELAX AND REST, NEVER AGAIN!
reviews.positives: breakfast ok, staff friendly
reviews.negatives:
Strong loudspeaker music at pool area from 10 AM onwards can be heard all over the resort, so impossible to relax and read a book, terrible experience!
As we do not like to sleep with AC on, we left the balcony door open for some fresh air. As a result all walls and ceiling got wet from condensation and water was dripping all night on the floor, our bed, clothes and computer, really disgusting!

reviews.title: Too expensive for what you get
reviews.text: Good hotel  for one night to sleep close to airport. But its ridiculously expensive. Everything overpriced. Rooms are standart size, bathroom is very small and old.  Diner buffet cost 89 FJD per person, breakfast buffet 50 FJD per person. Definitely not worth it.

reviews.title: Denarau Sofitel not worth the money.
reviews.positives: The location and isolation.
reviews.negatives: Staff were terrible and unhelpful. We felt not welcome probably because we are originally from Fiji and the staff seemed to feel contempt in serving us. Race seems to be a contributing factor. Thankfully we did not experience this in other places we stayed at. Will never book again.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Rooms were not ocean view as advertised. Bathroom old and leaks water, bed and remainder of room was good. Staff were extremely friendly and helpful. However the noise from people talking and passing by could be heard very loudly from inside the room including the music that is played at the club pool at night. The noise insulation is very bad. Housekeeping staff also start working very early in The morning so you hear all the noises and get woken up very early. The pool is great especially for families and the beach is much better than other resorts as you can actually sit on the sand whereas others there is only a rock wall. However , the sand is dirty and muddy , and so is the water , due to this resort and others being built on reclaimed land so you wouldn't want to swim in it. Not many food options, other resorts have much better and cheaper breakfast and dinner options or better still go to the port for more reasonably priced food. The room price was cheaper than other resorts

reviews.title: Every one in this hotel has his own policy and follows it in accordance with his point of view.
reviews.positives: Location. Facility.
reviews.negatives: Front desk, reservation specialist and manager’s behavior

reviews.title: Beautiful surroundings but can improve service
reviews.text: Overall good, however, the pool walls were dirty and did not look like they cleaned it every day.  The service at the Salt restaurant was horrible.  They did not know how to serve and need to improve etiquette.
reviews.positives: Front desk service, comfortable bed, luxurious surroundings.

reviews.title: service is not good as expection

the reception service is good and with welcome drink 
but the room service is not very goods as expection, as we asked for the slippers for two times, finally no slippers are provided
the food of the restaurant at hotel is good with reasonable price

reviews.title: Good Resort, lovely staff
reviews.text: We stayed at Sofitel Denarau for 2 nights as the start and end location for our journey to the inner Mamanuca islands. The resort is pretty nice with well manicured lawns & lovely pool. The room was spacious but can improve on cleanliness. Its a fact that the beach at Denarau is not at all impressive but the facilities at the resort are good. The staff are friendly and plenty of activities keep happening around the day. The coconut leaf weaving class was nice. The staff made me a lovely hat in just 10 mins! Overall, we enjoyed our stay!
reviews.positives: Friendly staff, good pool and lawns

reviews.title: Nice hotel but unhelpful staffs
reviews.text:
staffs is not helpful at all, they show their concern and enthusiastic in front of guest, but afterward, they left the problem behind.

internet access is as rare as diamond here, 30minute free internet a day but has a limitation in bandwidth.

swimming pool, spa and restaurant are great, nothing much, not value for money, perhaps another hotels in denerau are better.
reviews.positives: Atmosphere, nice restaurant.

reviews.title: Unprofessional
reviews.text: The staff were not very attentive. They were usually slow or forgot your order/request. Incorrect requests were placed multiple times. We felt that the customer service was biased and less focused towards Indians or locals.

reviews.title: Poor sound insulation
reviews.text:
While the facilities were impressive and well-maintained, the lack of sound insulation between the rooms was a significant issue. I could hear every noise from the neighboring rooms, making it impossible to get a good night's sleep.

Despite the hotel's appealing amenities, the constant disturbances ruined what could have been a pleasant stay. If you're looking for a quiet place to unwind, I would recommend considering other options.

reviews.title: Under renovation
reviews.text: Nice place to stay unfortunately they were doing major renovations at the time and alot of the main building/restaurant was closed which I was not aware when I booked these dates.

reviews.title: Under Renovation
reviews.text: The Sofitel Fiji is an awesome resort, it was unfortunate that they have not alerted customers to their renovations ahead of bookings.  Had I known renovations had commenced to the Reception area and common areas, on this occasion, I would have booked elsewhere.
reviews.room_type: Luxury Family Room with One Queen and Two Tier Bunk Bed

reviews.title: Resort is very nice but the bed and bathroom spoils all the experience
reviews.text:
Resort is very nice but the bed and bathroom spoils all the experience. 
Pros: Beautiful resort
          Beautiful beach 
           Relaxing environment 
Cons: Worn out bed very uncomfortable back pain guaranteed and you have sleep in the middle of King bed .?edges are worn out and can slip off.
Bathroom definitely not 5 star very tiny and tile floor is very slippery and full of grout.
When asked for housekeeping to clean or rubber mat you receive a rude answer we already cleaned the room wait till next day.
All staff very friendly apart from the lady on phone for housekeeping.
Only these two spoiled our experience a bit otherwise a beautiful resort and hope by our next visit we get a better experience

reviews.title: It is good but not the best
reviews.text:
Sofitel is located in Denarau which houses a collection of high-quality hotels by the beachfont. 
Their rooms are clean but quite old, especially the bathrooms whose tiles are so basic and not necessarily of five-star quality. You have to pay extra to enjoy the Waitui beach club infinity pool, or enter after 6:00PM in which they no longer provide towels. 

Buffet breakfast is okay, we especially enjoyed the selection of fresh juices that are made on the spot. There are several activities (e.g. pool aerobics, beach volleyball, arts and crafts etc) that guests especially kids can enjoy and they are organized as a daily agenda/itinerary. 

Food are quite pricey which is kindof expected in the Denarau area (there are cheap finds outside Denarau).

reviews.title: Undisclosed Prices - Quite Disappointed with overall experience
reviews.text: We chose the Sofitel mainly because of the "Adults Only" pool area, but we did NOT KNOW that it was going to cost us an EXTRA $99 Fiji, EACH ... PER DAY to use this facility. The "General" pool was big enough, however, it was not relaxing at all, too many people, adults and children yelling, splashing, throwing balls right across the pool. On no less than three days there were "Jack Hammers" ripping up several areas around the pool area, where the Slate Paving was loose and broken. Almost every day, we had to ring "Housekeeping" because, one day we had no towels, another day no face washers or hand towels, another day our bed was only partly made and pillows were without pillow cases.... Several days there was no bottled water supplied nor any milk for our tea/coffee. And that's not all! We had booked a "Luxury King Ocean View Room" and must say were a little disappointed when first ushered into our room. We expected it to be at least a little "Luxurious". I had planned this holiday for a very special reason.... Overall disappointing

reviews.title: What happened to 5 star resort?
reviews.text: They gave us a table in v restaurant with obvious red wine stains on it.....no good no good at all. Very not happy with the place at all......

reviews.title: Lovely hotel and good room service
reviews.text:
Our room was facing  sea side view. Fresh air and we had young coconut drink . Nice spa for relaxation.
We stayed  7 nights and food is very expensive  in the hotel. Bula bus fair is also expensive for 2 people.
Hotel needs to provide free service
reviews.positives: Very nice

reviews.title: Great location, but staff needs to be improved
reviews.text: Sofitel is a wonderful place in Fiji. However, their staff should be trained properly, especially for cleanliness.
reviews.positives: Many restaurants and safe

reviews.title: Sofitel experience Fiji
reviews.text: This hotel is relatively new.  Have stayed there before last year.  Our impression is that the hotel is very large and the infrastructure and staff levels are not up to the mark.   There is not a sense of being well looked after that you would expect.   The billing system is random to say the least.   It is clean and fairly attractive but lacks character.   I reserved this hotel purely on price as we also had two other rooms booked for family members through Accor.  This followed a family wedding on Malololailai Island.  So in total 10 members of the family spent 1-3 nights at the Sofitel.  At the time of booking it was the most reasonably priced at Denarau.   My overall impression is that this hotel is more 4 star than 5.
reviews.positives: Price, location.  Pool area very nice.
reviews.negatives: Inconsistency in housekeeping.  Had to ask for towels two days of the 3.  Breakfast is expensive and on the second day had to advise the staff the the cooked breakfast b-maries were not turned on - subsequently the breakfast was very cold.

reviews.title: It was great for the kids, not much for the adults.
reviews.text:
It was an okay stay overall for 5 nights and 6 days. The kids had a blast.
The buffet and dining options become repetitive after a few meals.
The cocktails and wine selection is not great and needs significant improvement.

reviews.title: Underwhelming
reviews.text: Completely underwhelming.  Requested early checkin arrived room not ready until 90 minutes past regular check in.  All staff very pleasant but housekeeping seriously understaffed even though hotel obviously not very busy.   My poor housekeeper kept after shift to do my room after 5pm.  This on day where I requested service 3 times.  Breakfast staff work very hard and deliver great service, large buffet with mediocre food.  More of a 2-3 star place.  Cannot say enough good things about people of Fiji.  Management needs to rethink what they are doing at this property.
reviews.room_type: Superior Queen Room with Two Queen Beds

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text:
good breakfast buffet, nice pool, childfriendly and good rooms.
bathroom very small and dining not 5 star at all

reviews.title: Honeymoon at the Sofitel
reviews.text: We had pre advised the Sofitel we would be having a one night honeymoon and were told by the booking people we would be noted for a honeymoon bonus! This sounded fantastic and we were excited to see what this entailed. On arrival, we received no congratulations, no upgrade, no special surprise - nothing! It was very disappointing considering the cost of the room.

reviews.title: Great base before heading to the islands
reviews.text: We just stayed for a night before getting the Yasawa Flyer. The food and drinks were good but wouldn't stay on the main Island for long - the islands further out are much more of an escape.

reviews.title: Short stop over
reviews.text: Nice resort, but the beach was a little disappointing.
reviews.positives: Nice room, good available food and drink, quiet night.

reviews.title: It's ok, not great
reviews.text: We enjoyed the time staying at the resort, it' was convenient to go to Nati town and the port, room wascomfortable , generally clean, room service was  ok. But find food and drink in the resort were very expensive , especially the food in buffet restaurant was not acceptable. Some of Gym equipment  was not seviced, and out of date. I never consider it is 5 star hotel at all.
reviews.positives: Location, room, adults club

reviews.title: There are highs and lows at this resort
reviews.text: Overall a pleasant stay. Our room was not ready on arrival at 1.30pm and wasn't ready until almost 4pm so an afternoon of activities was really lost as we couldn't get changed etc without being settled in our room. Most staff were friendly however we found the restaurant staff to be quite inattentive and not too  friendly. Food from the beachside restaurant was regularly cold when it should have been hot and warm when it should have been cold. Drinks were also regularly served not as cold as they should have been. The indoor cafe was great, good coffee and nice food for a light breakfast or lunch. Valet service was flawless and the staff at the tour desk very helpful. Taxis were easy to access to and from marina, only a 2 minute drive away. Our room was well attended and the attendants were lovely. Overall a pleasant stay however a few disappointments with important details such as food being served hot and drinks being served cold.
reviews.positives: Room comfort, on site tour booking desk, shops within resort

reviews.title: Friendly staff but other aspects could be improved
reviews.text:
The hotel looks great, great pool (there is only one pool), rooms looked nice. The staff are lovely, very friendly.

However, given what you pay and the reputation of Sofitel resorts this did not live up to expectations was not value for money. The bath had dirty marks on the bottom, there was no hot water in the shower, the TV had poor reception and very limited channels.
The internet access at the business centre is incredibly overpriced; $5 FJD for "30 minutes of internet" but this is actually only limited to 15MB (which they don't tell you when you purchase it). This allowed us to open one email before running out.
We were told there would be complimentary water delivered to the room and another bathrobe, these never came.
We will be trying another resort upon our next visit to Fiji.
reviews.positives: Lovely staff, very friendly

reviews.title: Lovely location but not the real Fiji
reviews.text:
used this as a jumping off point to taveuni to enjoy some pampering and sleep off jet lag.  the check-in took a bit and there was not a great attempt by the reception to inform us of the amenities of the hotel.  we received more information from the taxi driver from the airport, i.e,   bula bus - ticket is fj$7/day for travel around denarau and wes-bus - day to get to nadi town from denarau island.  if you are not on a pre-packaged plan, eating is expensive at sofitel.  we ate dinner at salt, which is ala carte.  food was good but a bit high.  for breakfast, we went to the marina (~20 minute walk) and had a good hearty breakfast with a great view for a fraction of the price as the sofitel.  

air conditioning worked well at sofitel.  room was comfy and quiet.  price was great through agoda
reviews.positives: Simple to find, has everything one could need in a  resort

reviews.title: Nice hotel with nice rooms
reviews.text:
Negatives:
We stayed during the school holidays (just after the new year) so the hotel was full of families and kids, so not ideal for a couples or romantic stay.
The beach is artifical and not the best. Whilst we stayed, there was a constant strong wind from the sea, blowing the sand off the beach and onto the swiming pool and poolside restaurant.
Room service was slow - had to wait for 30mins to get some milk for making tea.
When we checked in we noticed the mini bar had not been properly inspected and stocked, there was an open bottle of sparkling wine and missing drinks, which we only found out when we checked out and they tried to charge it to us. Although we informed the reception straight away and they said they will send someone to sort this out, they never came. To the staff's credit, they were pragmatic and didn't charge us at check out after explaining the situation to them.
On our departure we asked the hotel to book us a taxi, and told us how much it will cost. However the taxi driver tried to charge us more than what the hotel said... it's probably the taxi driver trying to get more money but do check with the taxi driver when you get on the taxi to avoid arguments when you pay.

Positives:
Staff is friendly. 
The restaurants are nice and the food served were of a high standard, though expensive.
The rooms are well maintained and well equipped.
reviews.positives: Well equipped rooms

reviews.title: Fair
reviews.positives: Breakfast
reviews.negatives: The  bed was hard, I paid $1500 for a night my brother had the bed and I had bunker the hotel should have put 2 twin for the price I paid plus I paid extra for me brother

reviews.title: Nice break
reviews.text: Good stay - lovely staff - very helpful and accommodating. Food at Watui for dinner very good - breakfast was strained for the team and lounge would have been better . Room and amenities were a little basic for the luxury tag
reviews.room_type: LUXURY ROOM, Beach Club Plus Access, 1 King Size Bed

reviews.title: I think for a special trip, there's more value for money at other resorts.
reviews.positives:
The food & beverage staff at the Adults Only wing are excellent - and none of the negative parts of our review should involve them at all. They were all warm, friendly, and great at their jobs. They were a true highlight of our stay at the resort.

We were allowed to check in early to the room, by just one hour, which there was no pressure from us to do so - so we were grateful for that, but then in comparison to the rest of our stay and the general effort involved, it really lacked in comparison to other stays/resorts. I think maybe we just sort of fell through the cracks. They even tried to tell us they'd upgraded our stay with free minibar, but I'd already paid for that prior to arriving, and I just didnt want to get into it with the reception and ruin the mood. Without me asking they said they'd moved our room, as if it was an upgrade but it had no extra facilities or anything, no view - it was the same room type but up the stairs. We were particularly friendly and voiced we'd just got married a few days earlier, we were excited to be there, thought there might be one or two maybe small special inclusions for us, and that was met with friendliness sure, but not any actions, so if you're looking for a special time, there are other resorts to look at first. This place is very expensive with less inclusions.

It's clean though, and it's new, and there's lots of people around for a busy atmosphere. Depends what you're looking for.

I do really want to acknowledge again how lovely the Food & Drink staff are though at that Adults Only wing, again to say they're attentive to their jobs, professional and kind.

The Jet Skiing for us was also a highlight - whilst we feel it's too expensive for what it is in general, it was a great morning to enjoy, and we thought the guide was great, as was the check-in process for the activity. The snorkelling off the island we went to on the jet ski was fantastic.
reviews.negatives:
There was no sparkling wine or anything on arrival in the room, which was included for all other couples that we met, and when chatting about our experiences, they seemed to have the red carpet rolled out for them in comparison with all their welcomes/drinks/treatment. At the other hotel we went to, completely different energy, they were SO hospitable. Here we ended up asking for some sparkling a few days later, as it was included for everyone else, but they only reluctantly agreed. We just weren't sure why others were celebrated and we weren't when we had been so friendly - we take pride in that.

We just felt like inconveniences to the hotel for even being there - we emailed them months prior, letting them know we were getting married, so asked them what their recommendation was for us to organise/pay for a romantic dinner at some point on the trip. They recommended a private dinner on the beach, so it sounded amazing, and we booked that in and paid extra for it to be special/romantic etc. The table is actually immediately next to the kids playground, and directly in front of all the other guests - there's a separation of about 10 metres. We saw this and asked the night before our dinner if we could move the table over slightly. The reception said they would see what they could do, and would let us know the next morning. So we left and waited the next morning but heard nothing. So we went again to reception just to check, and the person didnt know anything about it, said they'd ask, and let us know in half an hour. 3 hours went past, heard nothing, so we followed up again politely, they said it was hard to move the table. Keep in mind, it's just a regular table, not fixed, and we'd asked to move it roughly 30m slightly further away from all the crowds to make it minorly more romantic. The staff on duty agreed to 30m. It was such a hassle. But we went along, and have hilarious photos of it still next to the kids playground.

reviews.title: 4D3N
reviews.text:
Convenient place to travel around if you're planning to be around Nadi only. Check in took some time but most staff tries their best to support.

Located strategically, with rides to activities available.

reviews.title: Glad we only stayed one night; would not go back and would not recommend.
reviews.positives: The breakfast was definitely the highlight of our stay here, although it was already included with the price of our room. The room was very clean and the bed was comfortable, although this should be expected given the price that we paid.
reviews.negatives:
Our room was not ready in time for our check in. We were told that it would only be a "short wait" for the room to be ready, and we ended up waiting around the lobby for over an hour past the time we were scheduled to check in. We were hoping to rent jet ski's since that is one of the services that is offered at the resort, but by the time our room was finally ready the rental shop had already closed for the day. The only compensation we were offered for this was one free drink at the bar. The manager seemed rather unconcerned about our issue and it seemed that this was a pretty common occurrence. For the price that we paid and given that this is a "5 star resort" this should be totally unacceptable, but we saw many other families/couples hanging around the lobby waiting for their rooms long after the scheduled check in time as well. 

Aside from this issue I will add that we stayed at 5 other resorts during our time in Fiji, all of which were a fraction of the cost of the Sofitel. Given the price, we were expecting an exceptional experience, but I must say it was quite the opposite. We found that we had a significantly better experience at every other resort that we stayed at, and this was by far our least favorite out of all of them. The Sofitel may have nicer amenities than other resorts, but other resorts beat the bricks off the Sofitel when it comes to customer experience and authenticity. We could have had the same exact experience staying in the United States and going to literally any beach there, again for a fraction of the cost.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Excellent location, too expensive though. Problem encountered was my room being in level two noise from the upstair, even if someone was walking, dragging chairs etc was extremely annoying and hardly been able to sleep. This was not expected from Sofitel with a partial sea view room being so expensive. Good breakfast and restaurants.

reviews.title: Bad service
reviews.text: There are few varieties of breakfast, no freshly squeezed juice, the waiters seem to have not been trained, the service is slow and poor, I am a gold card member of Accor plus, I should be able to enjoy late check-out, but was told that it is not possible. We checked out on Tuesday, it didn't seem too many people, and we only asked to do late check-out to 1 pm, but they didn't agree to it. I was very disappointed with the hotel's service, especially the person who checked us in and claimed to be the manager. She attitude was very unfriendly, and she didn't even upgrade gold card members when the occupancy rate was not high.

reviews.title: Tipping expectations and poor customer service
reviews.text: members of staff make it obviously known to you when you do not Tip…tipping is not expected anywhere in Fiji hotels is what we see everywhere when you do searches online but when you are in the resort, tipping is rampant. There is a heavy expectation of receiving tips. Travellers on a planned budget, may be up for a surprise when receiving services in the resort, whether be it valet, bell boy, front desk etc. it could ruin the experience of a good holiday in a reputed brand resort like Sofitel.

reviews.title: Great Hotel
reviews.text:
While I enjoyed my stay at the Sofitel I found that prices in Fiji resorts are way too expensive and not value for money. I understand that resorts need to make money however the pricing is ridiculous and I feel tourist are taken advange of.
I am a well seasoned traveller to Fiji and decided after this holiday it's better value to go to Hawaii for this type of holiday. Vinaka

The bathrooms are a little tired looking, but the rooms were a decent size.

Despite this, so far Sofitel was good. 
Room was a bit old, but clean. Facilities were good, and staff were nice.

reviews.title: Best value for money of the Denarau hotels
reviews.text: I have stayed here for one night on a 20+hour layover. 25 mins drive from the airport, it's worth it if you want to relax on the coast rather than in town. Room was extremely comfortable, clean, reasonably spacious. And much cheaper than some alternatives in this area. Highly recommended.
reviews.positives: Nice rooms, quiet

reviews.title: Honeymoon was ruined, but resort was nice
reviews.text:
first and foremost, the staff were nice, the resort was nice enough, rooms were a bit disappointing ie ocean view is nothing of a sort unless you lean dangerously out of your balcony and crane your head to the left, but otherwise it the resort has the makings for a pleasant honeymoon experience for couples.

day 1 we check in at the sofitel and they had our agoda booking and we were asked for security deposit which was fine the only problem being without asking they placed against our visa debit card which overdrafted our holiday savings account by. the hotel apparently made a mistake and charged us for our full 7 nights stay at the premium rate rather than acknowleding that we paid agoda already online.

the problem was they wouldn't refund the money for the entire time we were there, instead held until 2 days after our return.

this was pretty frustrating for us since as a young couple who just got married and poured all their cash into a beautiful wedding we were pretty proud to have cash set aside for spending on the honeymoon. to have sofitel grab that money the second we landed and have to use our visa credit cards for everything and incur an extra 5% was pretty crap. 
personally i recommend honeymooners going somewhere else like the sheraton resort which was quite nice. you want it to be somewhere special and even though mistakes are made you want to be somewhere they do something about it so it doesn't ruin your honeymoon. sofitel demonstrated they were pretty indifferent.
reviews.positives: Beautiful location, great activities, friendly staff

reviews.title: sofitel stay
reviews.text: I think this hotel is in a good location in Fiji. It's a very nice hotel with friendly staffs. My family enjoy the stay very much, especially with the nice swimming pool. However the superior room's toilet is quite small and the breakfast is average. The only other thing is it is far from nadi town(need taxi to go to town). It's not an issue for us as we enjoy to stay in hotel for meals.
reviews.positives: nice hotel with brilliant swimming pool, had extra activities organized for resident
reviews.negatives: toilet is too small and breakfast is average

reviews.text:
The hotel is very nice and welcoming. The location in the middle of a golf course make it very exotic. 

At a walking distance you can reach the marina that offers a supermarket, some restaurants and the boats to the islands. It is a good advnatage as sometime the beach hotels might have restricting facilities.

There are busses in front og the resort that take you into town but there is nothing much to see, buy or experience. Maybe a local shop keeper will try their tricks to offer a Kawa ceremony where you will end up paying money for.

The hotel has a nice beach and good pool.

reviews.text: Our stay at Sofitel Fiji Resort and Spa was a great way to finish our holiday in Fiji. It was big but also allowed for relaxation,meals by the bay, and walks along the beach. Great views and even the weather when it rained did not preclude a great time.

reviews.title: Winter break
reviews.text:
First given a room overlooking a construction zone but were moved quickly on complaint-others not so lucky.
Rooms are nice but bathrooms very small and in need of an upgrade. Room servicing variable at start of stay, often came back at 5 pm to find it unserviced. Resolved this with housekeeping though. In general outdoors/pool areas looking tired and a bit dirty.
reviews.positives: location/staff/staff

reviews.title: Lovely hotel, good value.
reviews.positives: location, nice room, ocean view

reviews.title: Relaxing Refreshing Retreat
reviews.text:
From the moment I arrived after a long flight, I felt relaxed and truly transported to a tropical paradise. First impressions are everything and the hospitality service was excellent. There are plenty of food options, however the costs are quite pricey - so make sure you are prepared for the costs. There are pesky birds and flies because the restaurants are open air,so bring a fan to wave them off 

Be prepared also to not be in a hurry. The workers are truly Fijiian and the island pace is much slower than many people are accostomed to. So be patient, relax, and if you need something and feel you aren't being paid attention to, just get up or call and ask! Enjoy!
reviews.positives: Wonderful grounds, pools, and atmosphere. You know you are in the islands, yet enjoying the luxury of a 5star. The room was great and I loved the walk in closet.

reviews.title: "Above average rooms and service"
reviews.text:
sofitel hotel was quite good. arrived there and we stayed at the bottom level - which i wasn't too happy about as there were heaps of frogs just waiting outside the door getting ready to jump inside. it was quite noisy also.
asked the staff if we were able to change to a different room and they assisted with that; ended up on the third level (same price)

service was great - helped arranged taxies and provided information on where would be good places to visit, how long it would take to get there and whether or not it's worth going.

the only downside was that although i arranged for morning calls, i didn't receive any on the nights i stayed there.

overall, happy experience! however, international calls made through the hotel was really expensive - though i guess that's expected from hotels anyway.
reviews.positives: the staff helped arrange taxies, service in general was excellent

reviews.title: Best resort so far
reviews.text:
From the moment you enter this resort, you’ll fall in love with the environment. Freidnky and helpful staffs. So clean room, and around the property is beautiful. Had access to to the Beach Club and this area is just next level. Didn’t have the heart to leave the place. Food is of good varieties and various dining places within the resort. Tasty, quality food. The best buffet breakfast with so many choices. Very nice French pastry coffee place near the reception area. The whole ambience of the resort is incredible. Couldn’t fault it.
 Can’t wait to go back. Love the Sofitel Denarau.

And one of the best Vietnamese Pho I ever had at Madman So but make sure you make a booking as it's so popular. The only downside is there's only one pool and you have to share it with kids; wish they could have a separate one for adults like other resorts.

reviews.text: lol We had a great time! It’s luxurious hotel so pricey but be aware that a room is very ordinary and you can hear neighbors. The facility are 5 star grade and all the staffs are extremely kind! i was happened to know Mohini house keeping staff  and she was very helpful to us! Overall we had a wonderful holiday!

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Food was amazing and facilities was great.
reviews.negatives: With staff it was a bit of a hit or miss which was unfortunate. Calls to front desk went unanswered and I had to get my infant along and walk half the property length to meet with someone and talk. Also when I wanted to extend my stay by a day, I spoke to a receptionist at 6:30PM and he couldn't help saying the reservations close at 4:30PM and back office could not help either after he consulted them and I had to come next day morning. I decided to just book online because who knows if the room will be available the next day. I can't believe they could not do a reservation in a resort and that too at 6:30PM. Also some of the staff were great but others would not even acknowledge you and even when you speak to them they would be looking at other things in background. Just seemed too distracted. Maybe it was Jan 1st week and a busy time of the year but that is not a good excuse still. They could be better in providing service. Place was good overall but I don't fancy myself visiting Sofitel again. We have stayed in better resorts with better service.

reviews.title: Not bad for Denarau.
reviews.text: The room was clean nice bed and pillow.  But the toilet too small, bath room needs to up date..  Bit old... I have had better breakfast buffet in Denarau... There is room to be improve.

reviews.title: The last two days were tiring and unpleasant for my wife, the only help given was a wheelchair.
reviews.positives:
Meals, and delightful staff. Room servicing exemplary. Staff always friendly and helpful. Grounds relaxing and well kept.
Noise levels everywhere were appropriate for the time of day. Pool was fantastic and very relaxing.
reviews.negatives:
The tiled path across the pool became slippery when wet which caused my wife to slip and fall. No first aid kit or elastic bandages were available. The end result was an x ray in Auckland  She has a broken talus bone in her foot which means several weeks in a surgical boot and on crutches. Staff were kind and sympathetic but no one had first aid training or any equipment to help, We had to take a taxi to Nadi to the hospital. The xray person there said the swelling may conceal the problem which it did as on arrival and xray in Auckland it was picked up immediately. 
THE BRIDGE PATH ACROSS THE POOL IS VERY DANGEROUS! It needs matting and a rail, You also URGENTLY need a full first aid kit and a trained person to help. 
PS we went to the "local" Dr first, he had gone away for lunch!!

reviews.title: Bathroom not super
reviews.text: Bathroom not super

reviews.title: Would not stay here again.
reviews.positives: Loved the bed pillows.  Enjoyed Madame So restaurant.  Excellent Staff.  Room was spacious.
reviews.negatives: Screaming kids every where!  I could not even sit out on my deck.  Tried to use the pool, but kids splashing and cannonball jumping in pool near me.  Politely asked if they could move back a little as my iPad was getting wet, and they mouthed back that they had every right to splash and I should go back to my room.  Their parents did nothing.  The shower in my room had no shower pan, so when I showered half the entire bathroom floor was soaked.  If this was a handicapped room, I should have been notified ahead of time and given an option. Also in bath,  lack of hooks for robes or towels or shelf by shower for personal shower things like a razor.  Wish there had been hook or rack on deck or some place to put wet bathing suit to dry.  Most disturbing was I was sleeping .  Heard 1 quick knock, door opened and lights turned on by room or maid service, which I had not ordered.  They quickly realized their mistake and did apologize, but should not have opened the door and turned on the lights in the first place.  Could not get a spa appointment.

reviews.negatives:
Perhaps it was just unlucky that there was a wedding and reception held the night we stayed but the noise from the party was incredibly loud. We were travelling with our 3 young children and pretty tired after a days travel and I appreciate that the noise was reduced after 10pm, up until then it sounded like the DJ was in our room! 
I was also a little disappointed about the room size. Very modern and nice but much smaller than I had anticipated. In comparison we had stayed at the nearby Sheraton a week earlier and for similar money had a much bigger unit. 
The staff at both front desk and restaurants were great.

The various restaurants all had interesting menus, we found the Salt restaurant by the beach a romantic location. The music in the bar was enticing. The patisserie was chic. Children friendly, lovely cultural shows. Again, booking through Agoda provided good value.

reviews.title: Love for Sofitel
reviews.text: This place is my favorite . Theirs rooms , customer service and breakfast is excellent.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Having arrived at 2:30 am travelling from Japan we booked in and were assured we would be given the first available room however after asking on numerous occasions why other guests who had arrived hours after us were allocated accommodation we were again advised that our room was not ready. We were finally given the key to our room 12 hours after arrival and to say we were absolutely exhausted is an understatement!!!. We did not let this Bad start to our holiday have an adverse effect on us or our stay.

reviews.title: Jan 2026
reviews.text: We loved our stay at Sofitel. The bathrooms in the lobby could have been cleaner but overall it was one of our fav places to stay and we stayed at Intercontinental and Crown Plaza in the same trip. The staff were friendly and the resort had a Fiji Airways which helped us since we had a missing bag on arrival. The food menu could have a bit more variety but compared to Intercontinental the food was good.

reviews.title: Great Staff
reviews.text: The staff at Sofitel are extremely professional and well trained. Pretty setting. Excellent housekeeping and nice amenities. Main pool too warm and full of kids toys/noisy. Construction work on adjacent lot was unbearable but a room away from that side is very nice. Nice food and reasonably priced.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Great place. Friendly staff. .My only disappointment was the poolside orders took over 20 mins for drinks to arrive  otherwise great holiday x

reviews.title: lovely resort close to airport
reviews.text: first time staying at Sofitel Fiji. We stayed in the adults only section. There were a few hiccups with correspondence with the resort...things weren't done that they said would be done before arrival, but mostly was sorted out. Lovely pool areas, good views. Our room wasn't very large but clean and tidy and modern.  The bed was firm but comfortable. You can select pillows, but I didn't like any of them, unfortunately....should have taken my own. The staff are friendly and breakfasts were on the whole very good. In the adult's restaurants the serves for breakfast were large so I had to ask for half serve. The buffet dinner (international) was ok, nothing to write home about. Food at Madame So was very good and we ate there twice. Solice is hit and miss with serve size. My husband's piece of fish was tiny, but my lamb cutlets were a very good size. I would be happy to stay here again, although the price is pretty high. Resort is not too large so easy to get around. You can walk to the marina if you want, it is only 10-15 minutes easy walk each way and plenty of restaurants to choose from. We liked Nadina. They are building next door for a new, even more luxurious extension to Sofitel. Should be finished in approx 2 years....might be a bit $$$$ though
reviews.room_type: LUXURY ROOM, Beach Club Plus Access, 1 King Size Bed

reviews.title: The staff were so friendly
reviews.text: The whole experience was amazing, just a little pricy for Nadi

reviews.title: Not great for an adult couple
reviews.text:
Everything specific to travelling as an adult couple (i.e. adult pool area, restaurant) is charged (FJ$199/day) if you haven't explicitly booked a 'club' room. You can't even get lunch in that area if you're staying at the Sofitel with someone who has access to the area, which is pretty stupid as a business concept... who doesn't let you spend money with them?

All that said, the staff are friendly (if scared of sticking to the rules), the rooms are clean, and the facilities are good. The food was good, too. I am on the fence about recommending the price point. Reckon it's great for families.

reviews.title: great place

reviews.title: not bad

facilities are old, but clean.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: I loved  the Knick knacks you could buy from the locals within the resort, eg Art from Stu fantastic highly recommend his work and his honesty. The New Zealand  ice cream a must have, water aerobics,  champagne buffet breakfast, sometimes hot towels given by the pool (great for evening swim). Porters and their buggy ride to your room is a great plus. Downside- work was happening  on a room on a Sunday morning before 11.00am, but probably  a one off thing. However complimentary drinks were given and Natasia from the Breeze Bar certainly looked after us. Attended a wedding  in the V Restaurant food and service was amazing 5 star all round. Overall perfect weeks holiday. Vinaka

reviews.title: Beautiful hotel with everything you need
reviews.text: Well put together hotel, has a nice vibe and layout. The waterfront restaurant was one of the best that we went to in the area, for service and atmosphere as well as food. Pool was busy but not too busy during the day. All the staff were great. My daughter loved the kids club, and I liked the way you could just take them in at any time between about 9am to 8pm - it was not sessional or requiring booking - even though it did cost. Other ones we had to book a nanny as she is only 3. Room would have been great for a couple, wasn't very spacious as we had 2 kids with us for all our stuff, but not a huge problem. Did have a weird bathroom set up too with a leaky shower. Adults only area looked great but we didn't get a chance to go there. Everything was reasonably expensive, on par with other hotels in the area, food itself at the beach front restaurant was similar to what we would pay at home.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: It is a beautiful property but unfortunately during our short stay there to relax, there was a very noisy family in the room next door so my sleep was broken. The room was completely unsoundproof between this family and our room with only a thin door separating us. I could hear every conversation and noise they made. I told the reception of this during my stay but they had no solution or desire to find a quieter room for me.  Otherwise the resort was great.

reviews.title: Welcomed home big time
reviews.text: We’ve stayed at the Sofitel several times.  Since our last stay they’ve done a very tasteful job of refurbishing the entire hotel and managed to get back to a high level of service in just a few months after a long Covid closure. The prices have increased everywhere,  so regrettably Fiji is no longer a cheap destination but I guess most things are shipped-in and international fright costs are through the roof. By far the best restaurant anywhere in Denarau is the Sofitel Waitui Bar and Grill. As always the Sofitel staff are the best, they are so friendly an helpful, some of whom have been there for more than a decade. Special shout out to Waisa in the Accor Club, who provided the most attentive service we’ve ever experienced anywhere.  Nothing was too much trouble. Thank you  Hotel staff and thank you Waisa.

reviews.title: Luxe stay!
reviews.text:
After having stayed at the Crowne Plaza, Sofitel is tiers above! 
This definitely was more of a luxury stay. 
I had a split deal on Agoda and Robert at the desk changed my room so I stayed in the same one for my entire stay. 
Staff were very hospitable and remembered my name from the restaurants to concierge and front desk!
It was a beautiful modern spacious king room overlooking the ocean in one of the quiet blocks.
My room would get cleaned twice a day which was unnecessary but goes to show why they have a good rep.
Well maintained and beautiful resort. I like the glass water bottles they have in your room too.
Had a very good massage at the spa and gym had a lot of good gear to do a decent workout.
Adults only pool and club looked amazing but didn’t get a chance to book a day as it was rainy.
Only downside was the amount of kids in the main lagoon pool with a lot of floating devices for them. 
Sofitel open up another family pool so adults that don’t want to pay for a day pass at at the adults only area can have a place to actually relax! 
I will definitely come back again.
Vinaka!

reviews.title: Beautiful Resort with Exceptional Service
reviews.text:
Sofitel Fiji is such a beautiful resort to stay on. The room was clean and equipped with lots of amenities. The breakfast buffet had lots of options (English Breakfast, Indian buffet, bakery/pastry, cold sald etc). It tasted just okay, and the variety could be rotated more often - we stayed for 3 nights and had very similar menu each morning.

The best aspect about this resort was the service. Their hospitality was top tier! Every staff was super warmth. Every time I walked around the garden/hallway and staff members passed by, they always say "Bula!" to me, which made my first visit to Fiji! They were also regularly checking on us when we just sat around the pool if we needed anything and was always answering all our questions with smiley face.

Lastly, I think the room aircon temperature can be improved. The whole resort's aircon system broke down on the day I checked in, so I was left with super warm room. The aircon lowest temperature was locked at 21 degrees, and it was very warm and humid night (around 28 degrees outside). The aircon eventually got chiller over night, but still ... it was not so good first impression for the guests.

reviews.text: The room was perfectly clean with housekeeping done quickly and efficiently. Staff are really friendly and smiley. Pool is good and access to the beach was a plus. Breakfast was awesome with a wide range of varieties to choose from.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: We had great great time while staying in Sofitel, will recommend to the friend and relatives.

reviews.title: Satisfactory Holiday Home
reviews.text:
Good Family Vacation stay for kids, enjoying the white sandy beach, water slides, fish feeding, etc.

Breakfast has a variety for everyone to enjoy.
reviews.room_type: Superior Queen Room with Two Queen Beds

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Friendly staff

reviews.title: Relaxing in style
reviews.text: We were greeted with the biggest smiles when we arrived, every day of our stay, up until our departure. It was a memorable experience for our small group of 60+, rejuvenating and refreshing surroundings.

reviews.title: Great for making memories with loved ones
reviews.text: The friendly staff made us feel like we were staying with family. The facilities are top notch. Although unpredictable during the wet season, swimming in the pool whilst raining was mesmerizing.

reviews.title: Perfect place for vacation
reviews.text:
Amazing  place to spend time with your loved ones facilitates,  pool, services, food, breakfast are  so perfect. Staffs are so kind 10/10.
 Definitely  sending  more vacations there. And also recommending  others to stay.

reviews.title: Fantastic stay
reviews.text: We stayed in Jan 2024 at the beginning and end of the trip. The food was amazing and the hotel was top-notch. I honestly have not stayed at a better Sofitel than this one in my life!

reviews.title: Service with a smile
reviews.text: We stayed for a night before depature but the few hours in Sofitel was memorable. Staff provided service to the best of there abilities. Love the fijian smile! Will definitely be back .

reviews.title: Lovely foot massage
reviews.text: Amazing foot massage, so relaxing and refreshing. Feet felt soft afterwards!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The best place to check in and unwind in Denaru. Recommend Sofitel 100%

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Very Friendly staff

reviews.title: great 5 star resort
reviews.text:
We had a short stay here when our flights were cancelled. Really clean resort, freshly redecorated. Staff were really helpful and there were plenty of staff around and they seemed happy and well treated.  Didnt have 'rules' and restrictions like the other resorts we stayed in i.e if you wanted 4 towels you could have 4 towels not just one...
Menu was a little limited but that was the case across Fiji. Awesome breakfast buffet - an obscene amount of foods for everyone. Would love to visit again.

reviews.title: Amazing experience!
reviews.text: I will never forget the friendly natured staff, the amazing facilities and the all round quality of the resort. 10/10

reviews.title: Best experience!!
reviews.text: I was only here for 5 nights but the Sofitel has definitely left an impression on me.  Great family friendly resorts with amazing amenities to match.  I will definitely be back

reviews.title: Best in Class
reviews.text: Sofitel provides everything you need for a luxury vacation. Terrific pool, sandy beach, evening entertainment by the water, terrific staff especially Ben who provided exemplary service in the buffet restaurant. We’ll be back.

reviews.title: Pure luxury in the adults only beach club
reviews.text: The staff and food is so nice. If you don’t want to be around children in the pool you must join the adults beach club it’s private and you get looked after so well with food and drinks throughout the day and free cocktails 5-6 every night

reviews.title: Family holiday

Best young family holiday location staff and kids club plus nanny services 
Highly recommended

reviews.text: Maybe the best holiday we have had.

reviews.title: Fantastic.
reviews.text: I will ONLY stay there from now on when I go to Denerau Fiji. Great resort, excellent for children, wonderful staff and just a very warm and welcoming experience.

reviews.title: Perfect getaway
reviews.text: After Covid lockdown it was so great to get away and Sofitel delivered beyond expectations. We booked the family luxe room - the kids loved the e bunk beds and we loved the unlimited kids club and movies; facilities and location amazing and well suited for a relaxing holiday.
reviews.room_type: Luxury Family Room with One Queen and Two Tier Bunk Bed

reviews.title: Best family resort
reviews.text: First time travelling overseas with my 7 month and I could not recommend Sofitel enough. Definitely made my first family trip amazing. The staff were exceptional. They are such a family friendly resort. Everything at Sofitel was great. I literally could not fault it. Will definitely stay at fiji again.
reviews.room_type: Superior Queen Room with Two Queen Beds

reviews.title: Festive Fiji!
reviews.text:
The Sofitel was a beautiful hotel, the location, the amenities and rooms were beautiful. But the most impressive of all was the staff. They were so welcoming, so accommodating that our group felt like queens. We were a group of 12 ladies celebrating my sisters “40th”. 
It was so much fun. Thank you Sofitel 😘
reviews.room_type: Superior Queen Room with Two Queen Beds

reviews.title: THE BEST HOTEL THERE IS
reviews.text: I love this hotel. They were amazing and staff were friendly. My fave staff was Tevita who worked by the pool, always made my son Tevita feel welcomed. I would recommend staying here. They’re clean and always attended fast when we needed. Thank you Sofitel.
reviews.room_type: Luxury Family Room with One Queen and Two Tier Bunk Bed

reviews.title: Best of the best
reviews.text: Awesome location, facilities, staff and peaceful

reviews.title: Amazing
reviews.text:
We had our sons wedding here which was absolutely amazing ,the wedding planner did an amazing job perfect from start to end .
Sofitel great location staff were amazing g so friendly and helpful .
The breakfast buffet was to due for so many choices .
It was a little expensive but well worth it  pool area great only problem people took over pool lounges very early . Our family loved the stay here a downstairs room would have been preferable as lots of stairs to climb to our unit 
 Room was more then  adequate plenty of space   Very comfortable bed and Devine pillows!! Very clean  would stay again. .

reviews.title: Excellent resort staff super friendly superb facilities
reviews.text:
Absolutely loved our stay at the Sofitel for the night after returning from the Yasawas Islands.  The facilities are superb, outstanding restaurant's, pools were sparkling clean,  grounds impecabbly manicured,  rooms very comfortable, private balcony just beautiful.   We were given a 12.00 pm checkout due to our flight leaving at 8.40 pm and then had full use ofthe resort for the day including a freshen up service  at the Spa.  Added bonus was the Fiji Airways check in booth which allowed us to check in and have our bags taken to the airport such a great service.
We loved it so much that next year we are going to stay at the Sofitel for 5 nights at the end of our island stays.
reviews.room_type: Superior Queen Room with Two Queen Beds

reviews.title: Good Hotel in Fiji island
reviews.text: Close to beach and good food.

reviews.title: Excellent Hotel
reviews.text: Everything was perfect

reviews.title: Heavenly
reviews.text: We enjoyed ourselves thoroughly. It was relaxing, both children (2yo and 8months) enjoyed the pool and kids club. Easy to get around to town.
reviews.positives: Excellent service, plenty of activities and excellent dining.

reviews.title: Most comfortable and relaxing stay
reviews.text: Perfect stay as was said.  Pluses to staff, room, locality. Restaurants, golf if you wanted.  Clean room.
reviews.positives: Comfortable, quiet, relaxing stay

reviews.title: good location and friendly staff
reviews.text: very good resort which have useful facilities and friendly staff. every day has lots of activities you can join in to feel the fijian lifestyle.
reviews.positives: location and brand

reviews.title: Lovely hotel with very nice crews and service
reviews.text: Wonderful garden pool and perfect location are not enought to discribe the value of Sofitel Fiji Resort. There was a very impressive thing happened during the days we lived in this awsome hotel. We had planed to join a cruising island tour. It was my fault that we had missed the boat at that day. When I called the cruiser company to ask for a put-off to the next day, they refused. Finally one of the hotel's crew, a very nice lady, helped us to discuss with the cruiser company and manage to let us join the tour of next day, all free. That's really beyond my expectation. I highly appreciate this sweet service.
reviews.positives: My son loves the swimming pool with whirled slide.

reviews.title: Super sejour
reviews.text: Bel établissement, personnel à votre attention un super séjour!

reviews.title: Juste parfait !!!
reviews.text:
Superbe hôtel , personnel convivial et efficace. Prestation haut de gamme. Confort et qualité. Conseil pour les couples sans enfants : prenez le pass Adult Only qui donne accès à un espace réservé. Le service y est personnalisé et l’environnement … juste parfait !
Pour les familles , tout est présent pour amusement à tout âge.

reviews.title: Resort à l’accueil exceptionnel
reviews.text:
Nous ne sommes habituellement pas très friands des grands resorts mais ce Sofitel est exceptionnel tant par :
-la qualité de son accueil très personnalisé grâce à une équipe extrêmement bien formée et managée 
- un spa très pro lui aussi et cocooning 
- un buffet petit déjeuner renversant tant l’abondance, la variété et la qualité des produits sont à l’honneur
- un restaurant en bord de plage lui aussi délicieux . 
Un grand Bravo !  Nous faisons un petit détour pour revenir et y passer notre dernière nuit!! 
Excellent rapport qualité /prix 
Je recommande à 300%
Emmanuelle

reviews.title: Nice stay
reviews.text: After switching rooms it was a nice stay. The people/ stuff are very helpful and nice.

reviews.title: Schönes Hotel, aber nicht so schöner Strand
reviews.text:
das sofitel hat einen schönen außenbereich und die zimmer sind sehr groß und schön eingerichtet. allerdings wie üblich sehr hellhörig.
enttäuschend ist der strand, da man im wasser nie den boden sehen kann (total trüb).
der service ist zwar immer freundlich, wirkt aber sehr aufgesetzt.
das frühstücksbuffet ist super und das essen schmeckt sehr gut.
wir waren dort nur zwei nächte, da wir anschließend auf die kleinen inseln gefahren sind und wir sind der meinung, dass man erst dort die "richtigen" fiji´s erlebt.
reviews.positives: Schöne Zimmer und Poolanlage, tolles Frühstücksbuffet

reviews.title: Urlaub
reviews.text: Alles in allem wenn man die Preissituation zu den Leistungen sieht war das absolut okay

reviews.title: Wir waren im März 2020 zu Gast fuer das Zimmer haben wir knapp 140.- Euro pro Nacht bezahlt.
reviews.text: Fuer den Preis wuerde ich das Hotel sofort wieder buchen. Schoene Anlange und zum essen gehenkann man einen Pendelbus zum Hafen nehmen. Lage Top
reviews.room_type: Superior Queen Room with Two Queen Beds

reviews.title: Fantastischer Urlaub
reviews.text: Ein wunderbares Hotel, sehr schöne Zimmer, ein schöner Poolbereich und eine tolle Anlage mit Adult only Bereich. Für uns das beste Hotel in Denarau.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: For this amount of money, you can expect more from Sofitel. They should make a  difference between families and adults with no kids. Now they are mixed and they charge you to go to an adult zone. I don’t think it’s fare for this amount of money. The hotel is great, service not the best

reviews.title: ホテルのレセプションの対応がよくありませんでした
reviews.text: 朝6時にNadi空港に到着した為、7時過ぎにアーリーチェックインをお願いしようとしたのですが断られました。その後11時半に再度チェックインしようと思いホテルの受付にお願いしようとしたのですが、12時までは絶対に部屋に入れないと言われ、結局12時5分にやっとの思いでチェックイン出来ました。本来であれば、Sofitelのような高級ホテルであれば無料でアーリーチェックインが出来るはずなのに、なぜかフィジーのSofitelは駄目でしたのでホント残念です。あとホテル受付の手際の悪さ、そして態度の悪さ………幸い我々は英語が話せる為まだいいのですが、英語が苦手な方は大変だと思います。
reviews.positives: 雰囲気は良かった

reviews.title: フィジーではいいサービス
reviews.text:
先進国で考えると不十分なホスピタリティですが、
リゾートであること、途上国であることを加味すれば
合格ラインです。
reviews.positives: フィジーのなかではいいサービスでした。

reviews.title: 家族には最適
reviews.text:
子供用プールが充実しています。家族連れにはお勧めです。スタッフのサービス良く
全体的に気持ちの良い滞在ができることはお勧めします。次回もまた宿泊します。

reviews.title: 素晴らしいロケーション。バスでの送迎サービスには注意
reviews.text: 天国のような休暇でした。プール、食事、ショッピングはホテルとホテルエリアのデナラウ島内で完結できるし、むしろそちらのほうが望ましいと思います。完全なセキュリティとホスピタリティ、おいしい食事はホテルエリアでは保証されています。ダウンタウンはホテルエリアとは全く別な感じでしたので、あえて行く必要はないと思います。離島に行けばより素晴らしい海を楽しめるとは思いますが、ホテルのビーチも十分きれいです。ただ一つ残念だったことは、空港からホテルへの送迎はＴＴＦというツアーバスのエージェントがやっているようで、そちらのホームページから申し込む必要があったが、予約完了のメールが来ていたにもかかわらず、予約ができていなかったようだった。完了メールをプリントアウトして持っていなかったこともあって、エージェントから”予約リストに入っていないのに予約の証拠を提出できないのであれば予約が完了していない、予約をしなかったあなたが悪い、英語をちゃんと読みましたか？”と慇懃無礼な態度で説明され、とても不快な気分になった。空港～デナラウエリアのタクシーは公定レートがあるようで４５フィジードルのようであるが、揉めているのを見ていたのか、空港からのタクシーは30フィジードルにしてくれました。ホテルや空港のタクシーは町中のタクシーとは別の基準があるようで公定レート以上の請求をすることも無なく安心して利用できると思います。

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: 町から少し離れているけれどリゾート感あふれる高級ホテルでした。設備も申し分なく部屋も現代的なインテリアや設備です。スタッフの教育もいき届いていました。さすが5つ星だと思いました。
reviews.room_type: Superior Queen Room with Two Queen Beds

とても良き！
曲でお出迎えは嬉しいサービスでした。
ロケーションも最高！

reviews.title: 真的很一般
reviews.text: 如無特殊需要，只是一個很普通的選擇，同樣價格可以在外島住的很好，不推薦。另外酒店沒有穿梭機場甚至海港的服務，去機場的的士要價在45FJD，感覺如同被搶劫。但又情非得已。
reviews.positives: 有可以使用銀聯的ATM機

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: 酒店设施陈旧，房间超级小。早餐难吃，环境也很差！就是枕头不错

reviews.text:
我們入住的時侯發現枱面有一盒酒店送的曲奇和一張卡, 不過卡上不是我們的名字, 而是給8天前的那位客人的, 不敢相信那盒曲奇可能已經放了8天.
而且房間的hair dryer被拿走了, 要打電話到housekeeping才拿回來
reviews.positives: 貴

reviews.title: New hotel
reviews.text: Hotel is new and clean

reviews.title: wifi 差勁
reviews.text:
sofitel fiji resort & spa 的環境優美, 房間也很清潔整齊
在選訂此酒店時, 明明是寫有酒店內, 房間內都有free wifi 的, 去到後卻發現是沒有房間內是沒有wifi的, internet 也要付款, 至於其他酒店範圍, 亦只有一天半小時 (或10mb)的免費wifi! 我開了wifi不足5 mins, 就已經說我expired, 是怎麼攪的!! 差勁!!
reviews.positives: 環境不俗

reviews.title: poor internet connection in room
reviews.text: poor internet connection in room, can not even use any social medias/see photos/apple music etc, even after their IT tried to fix it.but its good in public areas (lobby/pool/restaurants)

reviews.title: 청소상태가 안좋았어요.
reviews.text: 정리 되지 않은 객실을 배정 받고 들어가서 보니 바퀴벌레도 있고.. 하.... 신혼여행이었는데ㅠ 그래도 저녁에 레스토랑 분위기는 좋아요

reviews.title: 소피텔 숙박 후기
reviews.text:
시설은 5성급 답게 깨끗하고 직원들도 친절함
공항과의 근접성 때문에 다른 곳에서 머물다 출국전에 머무르는 투숙객들이 많은 것 같고
호텔만 봐서는 다른 동남아 5성급호텔과 별다를바 없음, 다시 말해서 피지만의 특성을 찾아보기 힘들기 때문에 피지 여행시 잠깐 하루 머무는 것 아니면 추천하기 힘듬
reviews.positives: 1.공항과 근접 2.풀장 수온이 따뜻하고 유아 및 어린이 동반고객이 물놀이 하기 편함 3. 다운타운과 근접하여 다양한 볼거리 쇼핑이 편함

reviews.title: 추천합니다! Good for young baby
reviews.text:
직원들도 친절하고 아기들을 정말 예뻐합니다. 
수영장도 넓어서 아이들 놀기 좋구요.. 
가장 강추하는건 키즈클럽입니다. 
아이들과 함께 가는 가족들에겐 정말 좋아요. 
하루에 30불이면 올 데이 아이 맡길 수 있구요, 프로그램이 잘 되어있어서 아이도 정말 좋아합니다. 
다만 저녁 뷔페나 조식 맛은 그냥 그래요.

reviews.title: 허니문+가족을 위한 호텔
reviews.text:
허니문으로 다녀왔습니다. 깔끔하고, 편안한 시설 덕분에 편안하게 머무를 수 있었습니다.
소피텔은 국제적인 리조트인 만큼 고급스럽고 훌륭한 시설을 갖추었습니다.
아침에 조깅을 한다던가, 운동을 할 수 있고 저녁에는 식사 후 음료를 마시며, 피지 현지인들의 음악을 들을 수 있는 것이 큰 매력입니다.
또한 수영장이 좋아 소피텔에 머물면서 수영장만 이용해도 만족도가 매우 높습니다.
다양한 액티비티를 소개 해 주고 있고, 직원도 친절합니다.
연인 뿐 아니라 가족과 함께 머물기에도 매우 적절합니다.
reviews.positives: 깔끔함, 퓨어피지, 수영장

reviews.title: 추천할만한 리조트, 재방문 의사도 있음
reviews.text: 전반적으로 만족함. 시설이 오래된 느낌은 있지만 관리 상태가 좋고, 직원들이 청소하고 관리하고 있는 시설이라 생각이 듬. 조식 맛있고, 방도 깨끗하고, 수영장도 좋고, 딱하나 바다에서 물놀이하기는 좋지 않음. 그래도 수영장이 좋아서 괜찮음. 세상에서 가장 밝고 흥 넘치는 벨보이가 맞아주니 도착하면서 기분이 좋아지는 리조트, 직원들 전체적으로 상당히 친절함. 아이들 소리를 소란스럽게 생각하는 사람이 아니라면, 추천함.

reviews.title: Was great
reviews.text:
모든게 완벽했던 11개월 아기와 여행 
직원들 태도 숙소 위생. 등 여러가지 행복했던 여행이였어요

reviews.text:
둘이 쓰기에 작지않은 크기의 배드와 욕실도 깨끗해서 전혀 불편함 없었고

reviews.positives: 깨끗한 객실,큰 수영장,아름다운 바다

reviews.title: 신혼여행으로 오기 좋은 리조트

reviews.text: 햄버거가 맛있습니다. 인도구관조들이 엄청 시끄럽습니다.

reviews.title: 가격대비 최고의 호텔
reviews.text:
가격대비 만족도가 높은 호텔입니다.
넓은 수영장이 장점이 호텔입니다.
선착장과 가까워 섬 투어 나가기에도 용이합니다.

음식 주문시 고수(향채, 코리엔더)를 빼달라고 해야합니다.

reviews.title: 除了位置其它都是坑
reviews.text: 房间极旧，洗浴之后卫生间积水流不下去，服务态度一般，酒店沙滩黑漆漆的。

reviews.title: 客房小
reviews.text: 宾馆位置比较好，位于丹娜路岛的中心。但房间面积不够大。餐饮不错，游泳池也别有特点。比较大，。但沙滩比较一般啊，不如想象的好和漂亮，娱乐活动也不如岛上多，几乎没有。比较适合家庭带小孩住宿渡假

reviews.title: 服务不好，叫个服务员要一个小时，而且打了三个电话才过来
reviews.text: 房间很一般，没有五星酒店的标准。在差劲的是服务，叫服务员花了1个小时。游泳池还不错，有儿童、深水、浅水区。水质也不错
reviews.positives: 泳池很好玩，交通还算可以

reviews.title: 服务差
reviews.text:
早餐品种少，没有鲜榨果汁，服务员好像没有被培训过，服务又慢又差，我是Accor plus 的金卡会员，理应可以享受迟退房，但被告知不可以，我们退房是在星期二，看上去并不是太多人，而且我们只要求推迟到下午1点钟退房而已，都没有答应我们，令我对酒店的服务太失望了，尤其是为我们做入住的自称是经理的人，态度十分不友善，在入住率不高的情况下都不给金卡会员升级。
There are few varieties of breakfast, no freshly squeezed juice, the waiters seem to have not been trained, the service is slow and poor, I am a gold card member of Accor plus, I should be able to enjoy late check-out, but was told that it is not possible. We checked out on Tuesday, it didn't seem too many people, and we only asked to do late check-out to 1 pm, but they didn't agree to it. I was very disappointed with the hotel's service, especially the person who checked us in and claimed to be the manager. Her attitude was very unfriendly, and she didn't even upgrade gold card members when the occupancy rate was not high.

这里的海滩不干净，不漂亮。但是可以通过酒店预订去外岛的行程，帆船、游艇、深潜、浮潜等等，有很多选择。有一些线路包用餐等。多数可以当天往返。外岛太美了~~~

reviews.title: не понравилась отстраненность персонала в решении возникшей проблемы
reviews.text: Это только субъективный опыт. Бронировали на Агоде номер с завтраком на одну ночь, перед поездкой на Ясавские острова. Завтрак был принципиален, тк нужно было подкрепиться, прежде чем отправиться рано утром на острова. При заезде, администратор объявила, что забронировано только лишь проживание без завтрака. Но в нашем ваучере от Агоды черным по белому написано, что завтрак включен. Как такое получилось? Администратор отправила решать проблему с Агодой, сказав , что это вина Агоды , отель - ни при чём. Мне не понятно такое отстраненное отношение  к гостям! Пока не начали ругаться, пригласив третьего сотрудника,  и требовать официального письма от отеля , не решили проблему. Конечно же, после такого "приема" впечатление об отеле сложилось , мягко говоря,  не лучшее.

reviews.title: 這次入住 Sofitel Fiji Resort & Spa 整體體驗非常好 💛
reviews.text:
從一進飯店開始，就能感受到員工的熱情與專業，每一位都非常親切、細心，讓人覺得被好好照顧。整體服務帶著一種自然的溫度，而不是制式的流程感。

餐飲方面很有亮點，飯店內各個餐廳都有自己的特色與風格，不論是環境還是料理呈現都很用心，品質也維持在不錯的水準，每一餐都有不同的驚喜感。

設施維護良好，環境乾淨舒適，整體氛圍非常放鬆，很適合來這裡好好放空度假。

SPA 體驗也非常值得推薦，環境療癒、手法專業，整個過程讓人完全放鬆，是這趟旅程中很加分的一部分。

整體來說，是一間會讓人想再回訪的飯店 ✨

reviews.title: Unforgettable Stay at Sofitel Denarau - Best Resort Ever!
reviews.text:
Sofitel Denarau exceeded all expectations, and I'm already planning my return. The resort's location in Denarau is excellent, with a short walk to Port Denarau or the convenient Bula Bus service. While the in-house restaurants were pricey, the buffet breakfast at The Bazaar was a highlight. The staff were incredible, going above and beyond with their friendly and attentive service. With nearby options at Port Denarau shopping center, there was no shortage of dining choices. I wish I had stayed longer - truly the best resort experience ever!

Rating: ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

They responded promptly and arranged for the air conditioning unit to be cleaned. While the smell improved immediately afterward, it returned a few hours later, suggesting that the air conditioner may not be the root cause. This issue likely requires further investigation.
