reviews.negatives: Upon arrive I was told to park up the hill, where it was impossible to turn the car around and was told to unload my bag from the car park to the hotel! The security guard was very rude!! Even enquired to get massage done and was briefly shown the way without pointing me in the right direction which is very disappointing and it just only show me that the staff doesn’t not care about the customers. I would not come back to this hotel and I would not recommend this to anyone.

reviews.title: A  very relaxing,pleasant resort for Nadi area .
reviews.positives: Great location . My room had balcony facing the ocean view. All personally are very friendly, helpfull special thanks to folks at Koko and Solis restaurant .Losana  at Solis restaurant is extraordinary in her hospitality. Loved food and huge breakfast menu .  I enjoyed Spa service  , the lady Vaseva Qilivaleva has magic fingers and has to be thanked again. Enjoyed Bula bus ride to the harbor..Having Fiji airway check in at the hotel was so much convenient  I am glad to see water refilling stations and not plastic bottles !!Thank you. Highly recommend to friends and family.
reviews.negatives: Swimming pool was closed when I visited and there was construction going on with noises even at night . Walls of room do allow sounds from next room to be heard easily and door to room has no sweep so heard a lot of outdoor noises.hope construction will be over before my next visit.

reviews.title: Beautiful grounds, amazing staff, incredible breakfast buffet
reviews.positives: This resort was gorgeous! We only stayed here one night before taking the ferry to another island but we wished we had stayed here longer. The staff was incredibly kind and so helpful. The dinner we had at the steakhouse was superb. We had heard that the breakfast buffet was awesome…. Let’s just say it was outstanding!!! There were tons of amazing options and so many fun things to try. It was one of the best breakfast buffets we’ve ever had. We didn’t have time to enjoy the pool or beach much but the grounds were incredibly beautiful. The taxi from the airport wasn’t too expensive and there are shuttles to the port a few times a day. The location makes it super easy to take day tours from the port to other islands for snorkeling, beach clubs, etc. Overall we had a great experience here!
reviews.negatives: The main pool was closed during our stay for renovations. But the hotel did a great job of communicating this ahead of time so we could book somewhere else if we liked. We decided to stay and enjoyed it anyways.

reviews.title: A great resort which makes you feel like you've come home.
reviews.positives: The single most amazing thing about the hotel was the greeting and staff. From the moment we arrived we where treated so well and it felt more like a family vibe than corporate hospitality. The FOH where exceptional and especially the entrance where the lobby staff gave us a real Fijian welcome.
reviews.negatives: Without knowing the full picture its a shame the wealth of the hotel area has yet to spread out to the wider community. There is an obvious difference in living standards as you travel from Nadi airport to the resort. It great to see that Fijians are most of the staff within the hotels and cheap labour hasn't been flown in as you see in some places.

reviews.title: The resort was world class, always immaculate, and the STAFF WERE AMAZING!!!
reviews.positives: Watui Beach Club. NO KIDS ALLOWED. Made the pool lounging/private beach experience 100% BETTER. OMG no screaming kids or loaded diapers in the pool! And the staff WAS AMAZING. So friendly, so helpful and by day 2 they knew my name and all my quirks and preferences. The staff the staff the staff! World Class!!!
reviews.negatives: They would close the pool area very early. I’m a little bit of a night owl and would’ve liked to have done some midnight swimming. And there were no Jacuzzis. Though with as warm and humid as it was, I didn’t really miss one that much.

reviews.title: Upscale resort with all amenities in Denarau
reviews.positives: Updated clean and very comfortable rooms in a nice location on Denarau island. Great pool for the kids, shallow for little and water slides with bouncy course. Loved the buffet and open bar on the water. Super friendly staff, would definitely go back, great for a night or two before ferry to the islands

reviews.title: almost paradise
reviews.positives: The exterior of the hotel is beautiful and very well maintained.  Located on the beach with a spa, workout room, lovely pools, and fire show some nights .Multiple restaurants on site and the food was presented well. Staff was exceptional , very attentive and kind. Wonderful pillows with choice of comfort level.
reviews.negatives:
More attention needs to be given to the interior of the rooms, such as the mattresses, when they were changed out and their condition. I should not had to deal with sleeping on a filthy mattress and bedbugs...  I just didn’t expect this from such an amazing place so I had housekeeping changed my bedding which was very comfortable the sheets but by the fourth night I had bites so I knew I needed to look at the mattress. I must say they took care of the problem immediately, and did get a small amount taken off my bill. I did lose at least two days in this whole process and two nights.. also, I had a ant problem when I picked up my phone. It was about 200 microscopic ants so my room had to be sprayed around the furniture and that was also handled immediately when I found the situation.
 The sheets and pillows need to be good, which they were. The quality of the mattress and the condition of it can never be underated. It should be a logged when last  changed and inspect  them periodically for condition..

reviews.title: Wonderful stay at a fantastic property!

Silipa at the reception desk was especially helpful throughout our stay.  Beach Club is adults only and is a quieter and more relaxing vibe. The Spa is also top notch and worth a visit.
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Friendly and attentive staff, efficient check in and check out process,and luxurious rooms with stunning ocean views.

reviews.negatives: Rooms are overpriced in my opinion

reviews.title: absolutely breathtaking

the staff are what makes this resort! honestly world class customer service and always smiling its brilliant.

reviews.title: wonderful holiday
reviews.positives:
Hotel is excellent, pool and facilities are great for a family holiday.
Kids club was a hit with my 5 year daughter, teenageers corner was good too.
The Vietnamese restaurant was a hit, the staff amazing and food best in Fiji.
reviews.negatives: it was a short stay...

reviews.title: We loved every minute of being at the resort would definitely stay again.
reviews.positives: Loved the adult only side, the staff were amazing. Facilities were absolutely beautiful
reviews.negatives: Loved it all

reviews.title: We usually stay at the Hilton but won't be anymore
reviews.positives: The resort feel of the property

reviews.title: exceptional.
reviews.positives: exceptional from so many angles - the view, the lush surrounding landscape and gardens, the lovely welcoming and attentive staff, incredibly clean facilities and these were upkept throughout the stay (housecleaning was ace), thoughtful laundry staff, great fun pool and activities, yummy food and cocktails. premium!
reviews.negatives: nil.

reviews.title: Nice lush resort but pricey food and extras.
reviews.positives: Friendly staff, good service and very clean. Nice pools and the food was good. I enjoyed the lush gardens a lot.
reviews.negatives: Adult pool costs extra ($200 pp per day!) which was misleading. I wouldn’t pay that much for it, especially with room rates as high as they are. The buffet breakfast was ok but minimal fruit and lots of unique dishes (may be to some people’s liking). Food costs were higher than we expected but this is our first time to Fiji so maybe that’s why. Just be prepared to spend a lot on extras.

reviews.title: Second Honeymoon Oasis.
reviews.positives: The Sofitel was fantastic. Great location, we'll set out and the Fijian people were amazing.
reviews.negatives:
Greater variety of food options. Perhaps change the restaurant menus each night or add specials..pasta options, salad options... more chicken options.

Watersport were not up to scratch of a five star hotel. Availability of equipment was poor and the prices for some of the equipment/package was high.

reviews.title: Great people, terrific buffet breakfast
reviews.positives: The nicest staff anywhere!  They don't point out where to go, they take you there.  Absolutely wonderful buffet breakfast.  Close to the Marina for excursions.  Came for a couple days on way to NZ, but would like to come back to explore Fuji more

reviews.title: Great place to recover from a long flight!!
reviews.positives: I liked the pool and the ocean front cabanas.  Afternoon cocktails were great and the breakfast was excellent.  I did not like the room because it did not have an ocean view.
reviews.negatives: I did not like the room in the adult beach villas.
